title: Ordinary Object Premium Product Display AI
sourceTitle: Ordinary Object Premium Product Display AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Create a reusable premium product display poster with controlled variables while preserving the source prompt's visual recipe. theme: A reusable premium product display poster built around ceramic pour-over set. signature elements: the original object must stay recognizable while the scene, base, lighting, and background turn it into a premium product display layout logic: soft morning kitchen counter supports the product with a clean base, premium negative space, and lighting that never competes with the object transformation rule: preserve the original object appearance, color, material, and structure while only upgrading scene, base, background, and lighting composition: 4:5 composition, clear focal subject, organized supporting elements, balanced negative space, and no clutter. style: Premium minimalist product-display photography with clean background, refined base or tabletop, precise commercial lighting, and the original object kept intact. brand mood: quiet premium home ritual. restrictions: no watermark, no random extra text, no distorted anatomy, no copied copyrighted composition, avoid real logos and replace brands with fictional or generic marks when publishing subject: ceramic pour-over set as the primary visual subject, kept clear and recognizable while the template style remains stable scene: soft morning kitchen counter defines the surrounding context, supporting details, and sense of place lighting: lighting supports the template mood with controlled highlights, readable details, and no overexposed glow materials: original object material, color, surface texture, reflections, and product-grade finish remain legible typography: visible text must be short, intentional, readable, and limited to the specified title, labels, UI regions, or annotations. visible headline: "SLOW MORNING" Keep the visual style consistent with the template while changing only the listed variables.
